info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: adantaH  AvargIyaH ( garvaDAtuparyantAH AtmanepadinaH )  ' Syani gatyarTe padyate padayeta RO ' (Slo. 109) iti devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: honA milanA durdEva kA anuBava karanA
utpanna karanA samIpa rahanA cipaka ke rahanA
duHKa kA anuBava karanA vipattigrasta honA
